{{Infobox artifact
| name = Bow of the Silent King
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Bow]] of the [[Silent King]] is a unique and extremely powerful weapon constructed from the physical [[essence]] of the [[Silent King]], including its bones, tendons, and spirit. The bow's structure consists of bone limbs wrapped in smooth white hide marked by shifting black stripes, while its string is invisible until it is manipulated. It is capable of producing massive volleys of arrows that can obscure the sky, making it a formidable tool in combat. Because its physical form establishes connections to [[Icons]], it was specifically chosen as the vessel for the [[Silent King]]'s [[binding]]. Although [[Lindon]] possesses this [[Dreadgod weapon]], it is not intended for his use; rather, it was crafted to eventually be wielded by [[Mercy]]. The bow is considered a highly valuable and irreplaceable object, though its immense power makes it difficult for [[Lindon]] to even hold within his [[soulspace]].}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Bow]] of the [[Silent King]] is a weapon characterized by its white hide and black stripes, featuring an invisible string. Created specifically for [[Mercy]], the artifact possesses a profound authority capable of warping thoughts, dreams, and perceptions. Beyond its physical properties, the bow harbors a hunger for knowledge and a persistent desire to consume minds.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Bow of the Silent King]] is covered in white hide and has black stripes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Bow of the Silent King]] has an invisible string.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Bow of the Silent King]]'s authority can warp perception, dreams, and thoughts.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Bow of the Silent King]] has a hunger for knowledge and a desire to consume minds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Bow of the Silent King]] was made for [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
